metadata.description: Name of the Logic App workflow to create
Name of the storage account that hosts the DefenderIncidentTasksProcessed table
Name of the Azure Tables connection resource
Name of the Office 365 (Outlook) connection resource
Name of the ServiceNow connection resource

queries.$filter: @concat('PartitionKey eq ''', string(item()?['incident']?['id']), ''' and RowKey eq ''', string(item()?['id']), '''')

Compose_alertsEmailHtml.inputs:
@concat( variables('alertsEmailHtml'), '
', '
', string(item()?['title']), '
', '
', 'Severity: ', string(item()?['severity']), '', '   |   Status: ', string(item()?['status']), '', '
', '
', 'Created: ', string(item()?['createdDateTime']), '   |   Product: ', string(item()?['productName']), '
', '
', 'Open alert', '
', '
', 'Description:
', coalesce(string(item()?['description']), '-'), '
', '
', 'Recommended actions:
', coalesce(string(item()?['recommendedActions']), '-'), '
', '
' )

Compose_tasksEmailHtml.inputs:
@concat( variables('tasksEmailHtml'), '
', '
', string(item()?['displayName']), '
', '
', 'Status: ', string(item()?['status']), '', '   |   Modified by: ', string(item()?['lastModifiedByDisplayName']), '   |   Type: ', string(item()?['actionType']), '
', '
', 'Description:
', coalesce(string(item()?['description']), '-'), '
', if( equals(item()?['responseAction']?['identifierValue'], null), '', concat( '
', 'Target: ', string(item()?['responseAction']?['identifierValue']), '
' ) ), '
' )

Compose_email.inputs:
Microsoft Defender Incident
@{items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['displayName']}
Incident ID: @{items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['id']}
Open incident in Defender
Severity
@{items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['severity']}
Status
@{items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['status']}
Assigned to
@{items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['assignedTo']}
Created
@{items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['createdDateTime']}
Last updated
@{items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['lastUpdateDateTime']}
Tags
@{join(items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['systemTags'], ', ')}
⚠ Defender Experts pubished the following actions
These analyst-driven actions are part of the Defender Experts managed response. Please review them to ensure they align with your policies and operational processes.
@{if(equals(variables('tasksEmailHtml'), ''), 'No tasks were performed for this incident.', variables('tasksEmailHtml'))}
Summary
@{items('For_each_enriched_incident')?['summary']}
Related alerts
@{if(equals(variables('alertsEmailHtml'), ''), 'No alerts for this incident.', variables('alertsEmailHtml'))}

body.Subject: Playbook execution failure
body.Body:
Defender Experts managed responses playbook failed:


@{outputs('Compose_ErrorMessage')}
